fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Date and Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and time when this change log entry was created.

fields.name: User ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who posted the entry, to be used, for example, in the change log.

fields.name: Table No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the table containing the changed field.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the table containing the changed field.

fields.name: Field No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field number of the changed field.

fields.name: Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field caption of the changed field.

fields.name: Type of Change
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of change made to the field.

fields.name: Old Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value that the field had before a user made changes to the field.

fields.name: New Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value that the field had after a user made changes to the field.

fields.name: Primary Key
fields.tooltip: Specifies the primary key or keys of the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 1 No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field number of the first primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 1 Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field name of the first primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 1 Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the first primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 2 No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field number of the second primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 2 Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field name of the second primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 2 Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the second primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 3 No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field number of the third primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 3 Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the field name of the third primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Primary Key Field 3 Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies the value of the third primary key for the changed field.

fields.name: Notification Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether notification was sent, failed or was turned off
